projects.title: LuxuryNest Realty
projects.description: Premium real estate platform for luxury properties in Gurugram. Features property listings, virtual tours, and lead management system.
projects.challenge: Client needed a modern platform to showcase 100+ luxury properties with advanced search filters and RERA compliance.
projects.solution: Built a responsive React website with property filtering, contact forms, and integrated Google Maps for location tracking.

testimonial.name: Abhishek Rastogi
testimonial.text: Webcraft delivered an outstanding website that helped us generate 50+ enquiries in the first month. Highly professional!

projects.title: Iron Paradise Gym
projects.description: Modern gym website with membership plans, trainer profiles, and class schedules. Ready-to-use template for fitness centers.
projects.challenge: Gym needed an attractive website to showcase facilities, trainers, and membership plans to attract new members.
projects.solution: Created a dynamic gym website with membership pricing, trainer profiles, class schedules, and member testimonials.

testimonial.name: Mike Sharma
testimonial.text: Ready-to-use template saved us time and money. Website looks professional and members love it!

projects.title: Gaurav Associates
projects.description: Budget-friendly real estate website for properties in Dwarka, Delhi. Clean design with property listings and enquiry forms.
projects.challenge: Client wanted an affordable yet professional website to showcase residential properties in Dwarka area.
projects.solution: Built a clean, fast-loading website with property listings, enquiry forms, and Google Maps integration.

testimonial.name: Gaurav Verma
testimonial.text: Perfect budget solution for our real estate business. Website is clean and enquiries are coming in regularly.
